description: Anonymized sample output schema. Real PII removed.

sample_record.company_summary_ai: A mid-sized ambulatory care group serving South Florida with 5 clinic locations. Known for rapid expansion over the last 3 years with a lean internal IT team managing EHR and network infrastructure.
sample_record.icp_rationale: Healthcare company in target headcount range with active IT hiring and no large in-house team — strong fit for managed IT services.
sample_record.outreach_angle: Their 2-person IT team managing 5 locations on a growing EHR infrastructure suggests pain around support coverage and network reliability.
sample_record.source_list: US Companies 10-200 Employees · LinkedIn Sales Navigator

sample_record.linkedin_headline: IT Director | Healthcare Infrastructure | Miami, FL
sample_record.education: B.S. Information Systems, Florida International University
sample_record.personalization_snippet: Managing IT for 5 clinic locations with a 2-person team in a post-Epic migration year is a different kind of pressure than most IT directors face.
sample_record.linkedin_message: Hi [Name] — I work with healthcare IT teams in FL managing multi-site infrastructure. Would love to connect and trade notes.
sample_record.pain_point_hypothesis: A 2-person IT team supporting 5 active clinic locations on Epic EHR is likely stretched thin on helpdesk coverage, network monitoring, and compliance documentation.
sample_record.relevant_case_study: CFSE Infrastructure Modernization — multi-site network and endpoint management under compliance constraints.

person_table_branch_a.description: Precision segment — Healthcare IT Executives in FL & PR only
person_table_branch_a.note: Small row count reflects strict geographic + seniority filter. Intended for hyper-personalized 1:1 outreach, not sequence automation.
